name: feature-showcase
title: Interactive Feature Showcase
subtitle: filters, cross-filter, drill-through & every annotation type — a guided tour
description: A guided tour of every interaction the Studio can build, not just chart types: cascading filters with a shareable deep-link, click-to-cross-filter, drill-through (panel and KPI), the detail drawer, target lines, reference bands, callout arrows, period highlights, event markers, conditional formatting, color scales, and KPI compare + sparkline.

dataAccesses.name: ShowcaseKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),0) AS monthly_cost, ROUND(SUM(amount)*0.92,0) AS prior_month_cost, ROUND(SUM(amount)*0.9,0) AS cost_trend, ROUND(AVG(sla_pct),1) AS sla_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT region) AS active_regions, ROUND(AVG(incident_rate_pct),1) AS incident_rate_pct FROM v_showcase_summary

dataAccesses.name: SourceSystems
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT source_system FROM dim_datasource ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RunStatuses
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT status FROM fact_pipeline_run ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RevenueTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(SUM(r.amount),0) AS revenue FROM fact_revenue r JOIN dim_date d ON r.month_key=d.date_key WHERE r.source_system LIKE ${src} GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: CostByRegion
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT region, ROUND(SUM(amount),0) AS cost FROM fact_cost WHERE source_system LIKE ${src} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostByRegionDetail
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT invoice_id, region, service, ROUND(amount,2) AS amount FROM fact_cost_detail WHERE region LIKE ${label} ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 50

dataAccesses.name: AssetsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT source_system, COUNT(*) AS asset_count FROM dim_asset GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: StorageByPlatform
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT platform, ROUND(SUM(size_gb),0) AS size_gb FROM v_storage_footprint GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostVsUsage
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT entity, usage_score, spend_score FROM v_cost_efficiency

dataAccesses.name: QuarterlyBudget
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(SUM(b.actual_spend),0) AS actual_spend FROM fact_budget b JOIN dim_date d ON b.month_key=d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

kpis.label: Monthly Cost
kpis.info: Click this tile — KPI drill-through navigates to a target URL, same as a chart's drill-through.
kpis.subtitle: click to try KPI drill-through

kpis.label: SLA Compliance
kpis.info: Share of services meeting their SLA this period.

kpis.label: Active Regions
kpis.info: Distinct regions with activity in the observed window.

panels.title: How to use this showcase
panels.sub: a guided tour of every interaction the Studio can build

opts.content:
## Interactive Feature Showcase
This dashboard exists purely to demonstrate **interactions**, not just chart types — every chart type already has its own showcase elsewhere in the gallery.

- Try the **Data Source** / **Run Status** filters above — picks travel in the URL as a shareable `#` deep-link
- Click a slice in *Assets by Source* to **cross-filter**
- Click a bar in *Cost by Region* for **drill-through**, or its ⓘ for the **detail drawer**
- Click the **Monthly Cost** KPI tile for KPI-level drill-through
- Look for the **target line**, **period highlight**, **event markers**, **reference band**, and **callout arrow** overlays on the charts below

panels.title: Revenue Trend
panels.sub: target line · period highlight · event markers
panels.info: A line chart wearing three overlay annotations at once: a target goal line, a shaded period-of-interest band, and two labeled event markers.

panels.title: Cost by Region
panels.info: Bars over budget turn red via a conditional-formatting rule; click a bar to drill through, or open the detail drawer for the underlying invoice rows.

panels.title: Assets by Source
panels.sub: color scale · click a slice to cross-filter
panels.info: A continuous low→high color gradient encodes magnitude directly in the slice color; clicking a slice emits a cross-filter that other panels bound to the same parameter would pick up.

panels.title: Storage by Platform
panels.info: Both a continuous color scale AND threshold conditional-formatting rules on one panel — condFmt wins wherever a rule matches, the gradient fills the rest.

panels.title: Cost vs Usage Efficiency
panels.info: Two point annotations call out the entities worth investigating first — a callout label anchored to a specific data point.

panels.title: Quarterly Budget
panels.info: A shaded reference band marks the comfort zone, and a callout arrow with a leader line points straight at the one spike worth explaining.
